items.title: Polish-Based GRAI Secures €7.65M Seed Funding
items.body: Polish-based startup GRAI has successfully secured €7.65 million in seed funding to develop its AI-powered music remix platform. This funding marks a significant step in enhancing its technological capabilities and expanding its market reach.

items.title: Polish Warsaw Equity Group Leads €5M Series A
items.body: The Polish Warsaw Equity Group has led a €5 million Series A investment alongside Porsche Ventures, aiming to foster innovation in the region's electric vehicle charging sector. This investment highlights the growing interest in sustainable technologies within CEE.

items.title: Bulgarian Codery Acquires Elfshock
items.body: Bulgarian-founded Codery has announced the acquisition of Elfshock, a company specializing in robotic process automation and AI-driven solutions for the financial services sector. This acquisition is expected to enhance Codery's service offerings significantly.

items.title: Google Veteran Joins Bulgarian AdScout
items.body: A former Google executive has joined Bulgarian startup AdScout to address the 'trust tax' in digital advertising. This move is part of AdScout's strategy to leverage expertise from Silicon Valley to enhance its product offerings.

items.title: Slovenia's Approach to Startup Internationalisation
items.body: Slovenia is rethinking its strategy for startup internationalisation, focusing on creating multimedia content for children and AI training apps. This innovative approach aims to scale Slovenian startups into English-speaking markets effectively.
